summary: Completed testing of collective momentum indicator feature for ORIENTATION FIELD. All backend and frontend tests pass. Backend /api/orientation/field returns momentum_insight, field_momentum, momentum_strength, momentum_direction, and momentum_arrow fields correctly. Frontend displays momentum indicator section with icon and insight text. Current momentum is 'stable' due to limited time-series data.
critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: Backend calculates momentum from last 7 days vs previous 7 days correctly
GOOD: OrientationFieldResponse includes all momentum fields (field_momentum, momentum_direction, momentum_strength, momentum_arrow, momentum_insight)
GOOD: Momentum classification works correctly - stabilizing/drifting/shifting/stable
GOOD: Frontend momentum indicator section has appropriate styling for each momentum state
GOOD: Icon displayed inside momentum indicator with correct styling
GOOD: Momentum arrow only displayed when momentum is not stable
GOOD: Legend includes momentum icon conditionally when arrow exists
GOOD: Momentum strength bar displayed when momentum_strength > 0
context_for_next_testing_agent: Momentum indicator feature fully tested. Current state shows 'stable' momentum with message 'אין מספיק נתונים לחישוב מומנטום' (Not enough data to calculate momentum) because there isn't sufficient recent vs previous 7-day data. The momentum arrow and legend momentum icon are correctly hidden when momentum is stable. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_momentum_indicator.py.

backend_tests.test_stable_momentum_no_arrow: PASS - arrow is empty when stable
